## Source: ghsa-malware (20c39ab22ab4f9565da07a5e06ea6d04eccea38b8444b77a1a7269d8e268e14f)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (49ad89ab960db3d5775dcbda83df2d42c9b3ccb2e799c7ee83729e6451b94e02)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-reposinsights-reposinsights' @ 1.0.2 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
